# Missing Value Distributions

```{r, warning=FALSE, message=FALSE}
library(tidyverse)
#install.packages("pak")
#pak::pak("thiyangt/vegetablesSriLanka")
library("vegetablesSriLanka")
library(knitr)
library(plotly)
library(GGally)
library(patchwork)
library(lubridate)
library(tsibble)
library(feasts)
library(fable)
library(fabletools)
```


```{r, echo=FALSE, warning=FALSE, message=FALSE, fig.width=18, fig.height=10}
vegetables.srilanka <- vegetables.srilanka |>
  mutate( Item = factor(Item, levels = c("Beans",
                                   "Big Onion (Imp)",
                                   "Brinjal",
                                   "Cabbage",
                                   "Carrot",
                                   "Green Chilli",
                                   "Lime",
                                   "Potato (Imp)",
                                   "Pumpkin",
                                   "Snake gourd",
                                   "Tomato",
                                   "Potato (Local)",
                                   "Big Onion (Local)", "Red Onion (Imp)",
                                   "Red Onion (Local)"))) 

```

```{r}
#vegetables.srilanka |>
#  as_tsibble(key = c(Item, Type, Market),
#    index = Date) |>
#  scan_gaps()

vegetables_long_tsibble <- vegetables.srilanka |>
  as_tsibble(key = c(Item, Type, Market),
    index = Date) 
```

```{r}
veg_filled <- vegetables_long_tsibble |>
  group_by_key() |>
  fill_gaps() |>
  ungroup() |>
  as_tsibble() |>
  mutate(Year = year(Date))
```

## Dambulla



### Dambulla: Wholesale Price



### Dambulla: Retail Price

```{r}
missing_summary <-  veg_filled |>
  as_tibble() |>
 filter(Type == "Retail" & Market == "Dambulla") |>
 filter(!is.na(Item)) |>
 select(Item, Price, Year) |>
  group_by(Item, Year) |>
  summarise(
    missing_pct = mean(!complete.cases(across())) * 100
  )  |>
  mutate(period = if_else(Year < 2022, "Before 2022", "2022 and After"))
```

```{r}


ggplot(missing_summary, aes(x = factor(Year), y = missing_pct,
                           fill=period))+
  geom_bar(stat = "identity") +
  geom_text(
    aes(label = round(missing_pct, 1)),
    vjust = 0.9,
    size = 3
  ) +
  facet_wrap(~ Item, ncol = 5, nrow = 3, scales = "free_y")  +
  labs(
    x = "Year",
    y = "Missing Percentage (%)"
  ) +
  scale_fill_brewer(palette = "Set2") +
  theme(
    axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 90, hjust = 1),
    strip.text = element_text(face = "bold"),
    legend.position = "bottom"
  )
```



## Pettah

### Pettah: Wholesale Price


### Pettah: Retail Price
